svg.text: Tenant with pests → Hub → Topic → Pest page → Report a concern
Owner with violation → Hub → Topic → Condition page → Resources
Resident with mosquitoes → Mosquitoes page → Request a mosquito survey
Resident finds dead bird → Hub → Report a dead bird
Owner paying fee → Hub → Pay fee
Researcher → Hub → Search complaints and violations
Teacher / science center → Hub → Request a classroom visit
Community event → Hub → Request a classroom visit
